name: github_read_commits
description: Read commit history from a GitHub repository. Get the latest commits, commit messages, authors, dates, and changed files. Perfect for understanding recent changes and project activity.

sha.description: SHA or branch to start listing commits from. Use branch names like \

path.description: Only commits containing this file path will be returned. Leave empty for all commits.

since.description: ISO 8601 date string. Only commits after this date will be returned.

until.description: ISO 8601 date string. Only commits before this date will be returned.

per_page.description: Number of commits to return (1-100). Default is 30.
